_comment: ADLC approved-packages allow-list (default-deny). Single source of truth for the deterministic validator (hooks/check-approved-packages.sh) and the generate agent. Derived from ai-dev/rules/react/style.md + the generate scaffold + the approved alternatives (date-fns, lodash-es). New packages require an Adastra+Orix-signed-off PR per ai-dev/GOVERNANCE-NOTES.md. CVE/GPL are enforced dynamically by Dependabot + a license check (WS5), not by this static list. This validates DIRECT deps only (dependencies + devDependencies), not transitive lockfile entries.
